metadata.title: Quick 2v1 Hold on DEFUSE with Perfect Timing in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch this intense 2v1 where smooth positioning and timing turned the round around. Notice how patience and calm shots make all the difference.
What’s your favorite clutch strategy in VALORANT? Share below!

Let me know your best clutch moments in the comments!
